problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Viral. Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
